name: Microsoft Edge
description: Cross-platform web browser developed by Microsoft, originally an EdgeHTML rendering engine and rebuilt on Chromium in 2020.

years.notes: Original EdgeHTML-era 'e' monogram unveiled at Build 2015 — solid blue, deliberately reminiscent of Internet Explorer. Used until the November 2019 Chromium rebrand.
Chromium-based redesign unveiled November 2019 — swirl / teardrop mark with a blue-to-teal-to-green gradient, breaking from the Internet Explorer 'e' silhouette.
